name: multiline_transform
prompt: In the workspace directory, there is a file input.txt with one word per line: hello, world, this is a test line, foo, bar, another test. Write a Python script that: 1) reads input.txt, 2) filters to lines with >3 characters, 3) sorts by length descending, 4) prints only the words (not lengths) space-separated on one line.
expected_output: this is a test line another test hello world
